title: RFE - Python library
body: This is a request for feature to have a Python library where we could manipulate container images, like python-docker is providing, but with Buildah.

comments.body:
I wrote a decent amount of python code which wraps buildah commands in ansible-bender:

https://github.com/TomasTomecek/ansible-bender/blob/master/ansible_bender/builders/buildah_builder.py

I'm planning to move the code to container library of ours: [conu](https://github.com/user-cont/conu)
@EmilienM Is https://github.com/containers/python-podman/ what you are looking for?  Goal is to support Dockerfile for podman.  Or do you want lower level stuff like buildah provides?

We need buildah bug and buildah push so far.

On Fri, Feb 1, 2019 at 3:16 PM Daniel J Walsh <notifications@github.com>
wrote:

> @EmilienM <https://github.com/EmilienM> Is
> https://github.com/containers/python-podman/ what you are looking for?
> Goal is to support Dockerfile for podman. Or do you want lower level stuff
> like buildah provides?
>

Emilien Macchi

You can do that with podman: `podman build` and `podman push`; respective python-podman code:

https://github.com/containers/python-podman/blob/ae1ff6785714eb6418021e148401a89794570299/podman/podman/libs/images.py#L78

https://github.com/containers/python-podman/blob/ae1ff6785714eb6418021e148401a89794570299/podman/podman/libs/images.py#L114
I think those parts of the library need work.  PR's welcomed.
